overall_assessment.summary: DAY 6 POST-PHASE 35. FIRST POSITIVE SIGNAL: the 6-week consecutive impression decline streak has BROKEN (318→341, +7.2%). This may be early Phase 35/36 effects — noindex cleanup reducing bloat, or the start of redirect consolidation. /all-pages noindex confirmed working (Google recrawled TODAY). However: the #1 click candidate (20k loan blog) has NOT been recrawled in 27 days and its position has slipped to 9.8 — past the page 1 fold on mobile. All Phase 35/36 fixes to this page are invisible. The single most impactful action — GSC Request Indexing for the 3 priority pages — has been recommended for 3 days and remains unexecuted. The trend reversal is fragile and must be reinforced by getting Google to see our improved pages. Pinterest cron (a189625a4ab2) now running daily — long-term authority play.
overall_assessment.critical_path: GSC Request Indexing for 20k blog + compound-interest + mortgage-calculator → recrawl within hours → ranking visibility → first content click → validates Phase 35/36 → expand.
